notableEvents.label: Seiya Suzuki GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Seiya Suzuki grounds into a double play, second baseman Edmundo Sosa to shortstop Trea Turner to first baseman Felix Reyes. Ian Happ out at 2nd. Seiya Suzuki out at 1st.
